---
title: "lightning_rod.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\lightning_rod.py"
loc: 57
complexity: 7
logic_score: 4.67
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 4.21
overall_score: 3.34
---

## Intent
The `lightning_rod.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, optimize_file, LightningOrchestrator, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, optimize_file, LightningOrchestrator, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 22 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_bottom`
- `optimize_file`
- `LightningOrchestrator`
- `execute`
